title: Flush cart-service Redis cache
description:
## When to use
Use when cart latency spikes above 2s and Redis hit-rate falls but the cluster is healthy.

## What it does
Flushes the cart-service Redis keys (FLUSHDB on db 0) and restarts the cart-service pods so they re-warm.

## Verify after running
- p95 cart latency returns under 500ms
- Redis memory usage drops
executableScript:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
kubectl exec -n prod statefulset/cart-redis -- redis-cli FLUSHDB
kubectl rollout restart deploy/cart-service -n prod
kubectl rollout status deploy/cart-service -n prod --timeout=120s
